_attribution: Format mirrors tool_docs.json from CEO-Bench (zlab-princeton/ceobench-src, Zhuang Liu Lab @ Princeton) 1:1 — per-tool entries carry name/category/description/inputSchema/parameters/returns/impact/example_call, and fog-of-war is enforced at the tool layer (their _filter_hidden pattern: true factor scores are never returned while fog is active). Used as design inspiration with thanks; see FOG-OF-WAR.md and STEERING-SCOPE.md.

get_board.name: get_board
get_board.description: Return today's deal board. Under fog, factor scores are ANALYST ESTIMATES at each deal's current info level (±25/15/8/3 pts at L1-L4) — true scores are never returned while fog is active. Each deal's STARTING level is set by its entry stage: Pre-seed L1, Seed L2, Series A L3, Series B L4 — early-stage deals are judged on almost no data; late-stage deals are near-transparent.

returns.success: {board: '2026-07-08', fog: true, deals: [{name, sector, stage, blurb, hype, maxCheck, fill, infoLevel, estimates: {team, ps, diff, market, comm, ar, fin}, conviction}]}
returns.failure: Season already running — board is locked.

get_board.impact: Read-only. Conviction is computed from estimates under the current thesis — sharpening estimates (spend_diligence) re-ranks the board. `fill` is the hype-driven oversubscription rate: the fraction of a seed check a hot round will honor (1.0 = every dollar fills; 0.3 = the round is fought over). Fill is public market heat — never fogged.

get_thesis.name: get_thesis
get_thesis.description: Return the active thesis: preset name (or Custom), per-factor weights, and the financials-vs-read split (finW).

returns.success: {name: 'Product / Moat', weights: {team: 12, ps: 25, diff: 40, market: 10, comm: 5, ar: 8}, finW: 0.3}

set_thesis.name: set_thesis
set_thesis.description: Set the investment thesis: a preset name, or custom per-factor weights (0-50 each, self-normalizing), plus finW (0.1-0.6). Re-ranks every deal's conviction.

preset.description: One of: Balanced, Talent-first, Market-first, Product / Moat, Risk-averse

weights.description: Custom weights {team, ps, diff, market, comm, ar}, each 0-50. Overrides preset.

preset.description: Preset thesis name (ignored if weights given)

weights.description: Raw factor weights; conviction normalizes by their sum

finW.description: Share of conviction driven by the financials score

returns.success: Thesis set: Custom (team 40, ps 25, diff 8, market 7, comm 12, ar 8) · finW 0.3
returns.failure: Unknown preset 'X' / weight out of range

set_thesis.impact: Changes conviction for every deal — the board re-ranks. Recorded on season_begin for the leaderboard.

spend_diligence.name: spend_diligence
spend_diligence.description: Spend 1 of 6 diligence points to raise one deal's info level (max L4). Estimates converge monotonically toward truth (the canonical noise draw narrows; it is not re-rolled). Deals start at their stage's level (Pre-seed L1 … Series B L4), so points only buy signal on earlier-stage deals. Only available before begin_season.

deal.description: Deal name (or codename in blind mode) from get_board

returns.failure: No points left / already fully diligenced (L4) / season running

spend_diligence.impact: 10 deals × 4 levels ≫ 6 points: you cannot de-fog the board. Where you choose to see clearly is a scored skill (information efficiency = alpha per point).

set_seed_allocation.name: set_seed_allocation
set_seed_allocation.description: Set seed checks ($M) per deal, capped by each deal's round size (maxCheck). Requires ≥4 backed deals to qualify. Unallocated capital becomes reserves for follow-ons.

allocations.description: Map of deal name → $M (0 to clear)
Per-deal seed checks in $M, each ≤ that deal's maxCheck; total ≤ $100M

returns.failure: Check into X exceeds round cap ($8M) / total exceeds fund / fewer than 4 deals

set_seed_allocation.impact: Defines the frozen-portfolio counterfactual that selection α and steering α are measured against.

begin_season.name: begin_season
begin_season.description: Lock the seed portfolio and start the season vs 4 bot funds (Bandwagon, Index, Momentum, Contrarian). Bot behavior is board-seeded — identical for every player on a daily board. Diligence and thesis lock at this point.

fundName.description: Display name for your fund (≤22 chars)
Optional fund name shown in the league table and LP letter

returns.success: {round: 0, funds: 5, deployed: 31, reserves: 69, cuts: [{deal: 'Plaid', wanted: 15, honored: 8.5, fill: 0.55}]}

begin_season.impact: Emits season_begin {thesis, finW, customW, board, fog, access}. Hot rounds cut every fund's seed checks back pro-rata by fill (bots included — same market); cut capital stays in reserves. Follow-ons into seed-backed deals are NEVER cut (early conviction = founder loyalty — ACCESS-SCOPE.md). Index Ventures Bot is the published rule-based baseline every score is compared against.

get_holdings.name: get_holdings
get_holdings.description: Return your positions at the current round: units, cost, current mark, unrealized P&L, follow-on room, plus cash reserves.

returns.success: {round: 2, cash: 12.5, positions: [{deal, units, cost, mark, value, pnl, foRoom, secondaryBid}]}

get_holdings.impact: Read-only. Marks are public truth (the tape); factor estimates stay fogged. secondaryBid is the fraction of mark a sell fetches THIS round (1.0 = full mark, 0 = no bid — down round, illiquid).

follow_on.name: follow_on
follow_on.description: Deploy reserves into a held deal at the current round's mark (rounds 1-4, alive deals only, capped by round room and cash).

amount.description: $M; clamped to follow-on room and cash

returns.success: Followed on $5.0M into Airbnb at 18× → position $9.3M.
returns.failure: Deal not held / dead / round not actionable / no cash

follow_on.impact: Counts toward steering α: buying below the exit mark adds alpha, above it destroys alpha. Exactly attributed at season end.

sell.name: sell
sell.description: Sell a fraction of a held position on the SECONDARY market (rounds 1-4). Secondaries price on heat and momentum: an up-round name sells near mark (hot names at full price, quiet names at a haircut down to 80%), a flat name at 75%, and a name that just marked down has NO BID — the sell fails and you are stuck holding. Exit marks at round 5 are unaffected.

returns.success: Sold 50% of Notion at 6× via secondary (−15% to mark) → $10.2M to reserves.
returns.failure: Deal not held / nothing to sell / round not actionable / No bid — the deal just marked down and the secondary market has dried up

sell.impact: Counts toward steering α, which now prices liquidity honestly: selling above the exit mark adds alpha net of the secondary haircut. Down rounds are illiquid — the last chance to exit a name is the round BEFORE it turns (check secondaryBid on get_holdings).

advance_round.name: advance_round
advance_round.description: Advance one round (Seed→A→B→C→D→Exit). Marks update, bots act, round events log. The next_week() of this world.

returns.success: {round: 3, yourValue: 188.2, events: ['Fast collapsed to $0. Your stake is wiped.', …]}

advance_round.impact: Irreversible. All delayed consequences (bot follow-ons, collapses, mark moves) resolve on advance.

auto_resolve.name: auto_resolve
auto_resolve.description: Advance all remaining rounds to Exit without further actions. Steering α will be exactly 0 for the skipped stretch (pure buy-and-hold).
auto_resolve.impact: Emits auto_resolve {fromRound}. Segments the leaderboard into pure-selection vs steered runs.

get_standings.name: get_standings
get_standings.description: League table at the current round: every fund's total profit, sorted. Your margin over Index Ventures Bot is the baseline comparison.

get_result.name: get_result
get_result.description: Final scorecard after Exit: rank, multiple, profit decomposition (selection α + steering α), access α (what oversubscription cost or saved you vs your intended checks — negative means the hot rounds squeezed you out of winners), judgment accuracy, calibration (fog), scout tier, and the board id for leaderboard grouping.

returns.success: {rank: 3, funds: 5, mult: 24.39, profit: 2339, selProfit: 2288, steerAlpha: 51, accessAlpha: -412, judgment: 94, calibration: 82, scoutTier: 'silver', board: '2026-07-08', fog: true, access: true}

get_result.impact: Read-only. This is the row the VC-Bench leaderboard ingests — humans and agents on the same daily board are directly comparable.
